audience: Founders starting a B2B SaaS trial
input: Write an onboarding email that gets a founder to create their first campaign brief.
body: You opened the workspace. The fastest way to see value is to create one campaign brief with your audience, offer, and goal in the same place. Start with the launch template, add three bullets, and invite one teammate when you are ready.
output: Create your first campaign brief You opened the workspace. The fastest way to see value is to create one campaign brief with your audience, offer, and goal in the same place. Start with the launch template, add three bullets, and invite one teammate when you are ready.

audience: Lifecycle marketers at a mid-stage SaaS company
input: Write an email that nudges a marketer to connect their customer data source.
body: Your first lifecycle map is only as useful as the customer data behind it. Connect your CRM today and Goldset will show which segments are ready for onboarding, expansion, or winback messages. It takes about five minutes to set up.
output: Connect your customer data Your first lifecycle map is only as useful as the customer data behind it. Connect your CRM today and Goldset will show which segments are ready for onboarding, expansion, or winback messages. It takes about five minutes to set up.

audience: Revenue operators evaluating a GTM workflow tool
input: Write an email that gets an operator to invite sales and marketing teammates.
subject_line: Get sales and marketing in one view
body: Your scorecard is ready, but it will be more useful with the people who own the follow-up. Invite one sales teammate and one marketing teammate so everyone can see the same campaign risks before the next pipeline review.
output: Get sales and marketing in one view Your scorecard is ready, but it will be more useful with the people who own the follow-up. Invite one sales teammate and one marketing teammate so everyone can see the same campaign risks before the next pipeline review.
